viewfinderDescription: Start a local camera preview, then take a photo or record a short clip without uploading media anywhere.
cameraIdleDescription: Start the preview when you are ready to grant camera access.
cameraNotSupportedDescription: This browser or context does not expose the camera API. Try a modern browser on HTTPS or localhost.
cameraPermissionDeniedDescription: Allow camera access in your browser settings, then retry.
cameraErrorDescription: The camera could not be opened. Check whether another app is using it and try again.
videoNotSupported: Video recording is not supported in this browser.
outputDescription: Review the latest photo or video before downloading it.
emptyOutputDescription: Take a photo or finish recording a clip to preview it here.
